simpleExplanation.title: Poverty — explained simply

faq.q: Is this Economics Poverty lesson free?
faq.a: Yes — every topic in our 2281 course is free. MarkScheme offers free past-paper marking so you can turn notes into marks.
Scroll to the past-paper section on this page — we surface real Cambridge questions tagged to 5.2 from our mark-scheme library.

sections.content: Welcome to your **free Economics** lesson on **Poverty** (5.2). This is syllabus point 5.2 on **Paper 2 (Structured Questions)** — structured like a premium revision course, with past-paper practice built in.

items: Master the vocabulary examiners use in mark schemes for Poverty
Know which paper (P2) tests this topic most often

Use “Explain simpler” below if the main lesson feels too advanced

sections.content: Cambridge 2281 rewards clear definitions, labelled diagrams, and applied examples from the data. On Paper 2 (Structured Questions), Poverty often appears as MC items or structured questions — plan before writing longer answers.
